zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar於1442年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾金努爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar34歲，母親Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson28歲。他於1457年之前與Christian Erskine結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年在英國蘇格蘭莫雷埃爾金享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar于1442年出生在英国苏格兰培爾金努爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar34岁，母亲Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson28岁。他于1457年之前与Christian Erskine结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年在英国苏格兰莫雷埃爾金享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar was born in 1442, in Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, was 28. He married Christian Erskine before 1457. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1494, in Elgin, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar est né en 1442, à Kinnoul, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Christian Erskine avant 1457. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1494, à Elgin, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar 1442 in Kinnoul, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson 28. Er hat vor 1457 Christian Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1494 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Elgin, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar è nato il nel 1442 nel Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Christian Erskine prima del 1457. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1494, nel Elgin, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquharが1442年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアキノウルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquharは34歳，母Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonは28歳であった。1457年以前にChristian Erskineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年にイギリススコットランドモーアイエルジンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar(이)가 1442년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 킨우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1457년 이전 Christian Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 엘긴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar nasceu em 1442, em Kinnoul, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Erskine antes 1457. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1494, em Elgin, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar родился в 1442 г. в местности кинноул, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Erskine перед 1457 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности элгин, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar nació en 1442, en Kinnoul, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Christian Erskine antes de 1457. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1494, en Elgin, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
